name: LSTrans: Efficient Knowledge Transfer for Lightweight and Automated ECG Classification

description: arXiv:2607.10784v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Deploying deep learning models for automated electrocardiogram classification on resource-constrained wearable devices remains challenging due to high computational costs. To address this, we propose LSTrans, a lightweight hybrid model designed for efficient and sensitive ECG analysis. LSTrans introduces a specialized 1D convolutional backbone w...
author: Yi Zhao, Jiajun Gao, Chenyang Xu, Yuxi Zhou, Hao Wang
